top_signals.title: Markets Are Buying Into Less Uncertainty: Capital.com
top_signals.summary: Kyle Rodda of Capital.com shares his views on the de-dollarization trade and market volatility. He says it shouldn't be understated "how significant it is that the United States is inviting Iran, effectively, back into global trade, selling its oil into global markets." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australia's Firmus announces Nvidia-backed 'AI factory' in Indonesia

top_signals.title: ‘Heated Rivalry’ fuels a boom in gay romance stories, with women leading the fandom
top_signals.summary: ‘Heated Rivalry’ has helped gay romance stories gain mainstream attention, with women driving much of the fandom.

top_signals.title: Japan’s retail sales rise a third month on wage gains, subsidies
top_signals.summary: The 1.9% month-on-month advance was led by sales of vehicles, pharmaceuticals and cosmetics.
